MARTIN François RO RTR NG2 1 04 Tel : +40 21 40 62005 francois.martin-renexter@renault.com

Item.Text: 0x09 : illegal change of locked bits in PLL configuration registers
0x19 : a branch to a an unimplemented exception vector has occured
0x21 : unplausible case of ASDdc parameter set selection
0x23 : unplausible case of ASDrf parameter set selection
0x24 : Bypass: stopped by ASCETSD or timeout
0x25 : an error in CoEng_ShOff state machine has occured
0x26 : Default state of engine state machine reached
0x27 : default case of glow control state machine
0x28 : Recovery with full test extent which is triggerd after 3 other recoveries
0x29 : Default state of injector quantity adjustment
0x2A : Unplausible case of LiGov parameter set selection
0x2B : Default state of setpoint calculation of metering unit has occured
0x2C : cyclic: RAM check of memory monitoring failed
0x2D : cyclic: ROM check of memory monitoring failed
0x31 : MON: TPU Code emulation RAM checksum failure detected
0x39 : Operating system: time table already active
0x3A : Operating system: argument out of range
0x3B : Plausibility error in engine speed check
0x3C : Energising time exceeds limit of overrun monitoring
0x3D : Default case of set point tracking
0x3E : Default state of rail pressure sensor offset state has occured
0x3F : Default state of rail pressure governor state machine has occured
0x41 : Default state of ramping during start was reached
0x42 : Default state of engine coordinator was reached
0x43 : Default state of starting cut out monitoring was reached
0x44 : Default state of turbocharger cooling pump machine was reached

PFlt_mSotIni - Initial value of estimated soot mass
PFlt_ctRgnMed - Regeneration sucess counter in medium condition
PFlt_stDiagExtEna - Diagnosis inhibition by after-sales tool
PFlt_mSotEstOfsCldStrt Estimated soot mass offset for cold start conditions
PFlt_lSumlifti - Driven distance since last particle filter change
PFlt_mSot - Soot mass inside the particle filter since last filter change
PFlt_lSumInjVlv - Total driven distance with the actual injector
PFlt_mSotMin - Minimum value reached by estimated soot mass
PFlt_mSotMax - Maximum value reached by estimated soot mass
PFlt_mSotSimIni - initial value reached by simulated soot mass
PFlt_mSotSimMin - Minimum value reached by simulated soot mass
PFlt_mSotSimMax - Maximum value reached by simulated soot mass
PFlt_lSumChrgBeg - Driven distance at beginning of state charging
PFlt_mOfsSotSimRaw_mp - Offset of simulated soot mass
PFlt_mISotEst - Initialisation value for estimated soot mass integrator
PFlt_tmrRgnAllowOffs - Offset for timer of particulate regeneration allowance
PFlt_swtSotEstInit - Activation/desactivation of estimated soot mass initialisation

PFlt_ctRgnHot - regeneration success counter in hot condition
PFlt_rOilRgnNrmOfs - Offset ratio in normal mode for rege allowance
PFlt_rOilRgnRaw_mp - Raw value for oil evaporation ratio
AirCtl_stDisbl_mp - Flag for inhibition of the Air system adaption strategy
AirCtl_stLrn_mp - Learning status of engine breakpoint
AirCtl_ctNoSucLrn - Number of unsuccessful learning phases
AirCtl_ctSucLrn - Number of successful learning phases
PCR_facOshtMaxEEP - PCR Maximum overshoot criteria stored in EEPROM (ASA)
PCR_facUshMaxEEP - PCCR Maximum undershoot criteria stored in EEPROM
PCR_pGovDevMaxEEP - PCR maximum governor deviation dtored in EEPROM
PCR_ctOshtMaxEEP - PCR Last max count of ovreshoot criteria exceeding the threshold, stored in EEPROM
PCR_ctUshtMaxEEP - PCR Last Max count of undershoot criteria exceeding the threshold, stored in EEPROM
EGRCD_rOfsFirst - EGR Offset of first drive cycle
EGRCD_rOfsLst - EGR Offset from the last driving cycle
BPSCD_pOfs - Diff pressure for boost pressure stored in EEPROM
AirCtl_lEGRCln - Value of the distance at the last EGR valve cleaning activation
AirCtl_tiEGRCln - Duration of the EGR valve cleaning activation
AirCtl_lSumCln - Total distance driven since last EGR valve service

Label.Text: * Ecart distance signifie que la distance affichée est la distance entre l'enregistrement et le précédent
Ex: Enregistrement [15]: Ecart distance 51Km; véhicule a parcouru 51 Km depuis l'enregistrement [16] jusqu'à l'enregistrement [15]
Résolution de la variable "masse de suie" : 0.8g
* Ecart distance signifie que la distance affichée est la distance entre l'enregistrement et le précédent
Ex: Enregistrement [15]: Ecart distance 51Km; véhicule a parcouru 51 Km depuis l'enregistrement [16] jusqu'à l'enregistrement [15]
Trigger : entrée dans l'état "regeneration failure" (0x50) et sans regeneration partielle
Trigger : entrée dans l'état "Speed request" (0x08) ET front montant de PFlt_stSpReqDrvRec_mp
Résolution de la variable "masse de suie" : 1.6g
Trigger : kilométrique defini par la calibration PFlt_lPFltDrvRec_C
Résolution de la variable "masse de suie simulée" : 1.6g
